subject: Login after boot very slow with spinning cursor
description: After entering password, desktop takes 5+ minutes; eventually loads with all startup apps.

ts_steps.title: Startup apps
ts_steps.action: Task Manager → Startup — disable non-essential high-impact items; reboot test.

ts_steps.title: User profile on network
ts_steps.action: If roaming profile — check size and sync errors; local profile test user to compare.

ts_steps.title: Event Viewer
ts_steps.action: Review Application and System log around logon time for group policy or script timeouts.

internal_information: GPO script mapping drives, AV scan at logon, or bloated profile. Desktop engineering for GPO changes.
